opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Ruined couch looks brand new for $57 — pet owners are obsessed
opportunities.before_state: Faded, fur-covered, stained sectional that guests notice immediately
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, clean, fitted cover that looks like a new couch with zero pet hair visible
buyer_intent_keywords: couch cover that stays in place
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning season peaks in May and pet owners are actively refreshing living rooms before summer guests arrive, making the before/after payoff visually undeniable.

opportunities.specific_product: HOKEEPER modular closet organizer with shelves and drawers
opportunities.transformation_hook: Chaotic closet to Pinterest-worthy storage for $64 in one afternoon
opportunities.before_state: Clothes piled on the floor, single rod overloaded, nothing findable in the morning rush
opportunities.after_state: Double-hang sections, labeled cubbies, folded items visible — every item has a home
opportunities.why_now: May is peak spring-cleaning momentum — search volume for closet organization spikes 40%+ through mid-June and before/after closet Reels are consistently the highest-saved format.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia stainless steel kitchen tool set with holder
opportunities.transformation_hook: Replace that mismatched drawer chaos with a matching set for $38
opportunities.before_state: Drawer stuffed with mismatched plastic spatulas, melted handles, and mystery tools
opportunities.after_state: Matching matte utensil set in a sleek countertop holder — kitchen feels like a renovation
opportunities.why_now: Spring meal-prep content is surging and kitchen-counter transformation Reels routinely outperform other rooms — matching sets trigger high impulse-buy behavior at this price point.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm Original Side-Sleeper Pillow with adjustable fill
opportunities.transformation_hook: Woke up with neck pain every day — $99 pillow fixed it in one night
opportunities.before_state: Waking up stiff, flat conventional pillow folded under head, poor sleep quality for months
opportunities.after_state: U-shaped cutout cradles shoulder, spine aligned, sleeping through the night without neck pain
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for side sleepers neck pain
opportunities.why_now: Sleep health content has sustained high engagement post-winter and the pain-point hook (neck pain → fixed) drives exceptional save and share rates with strong repeat purchase signals.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products modern accent armchair with wood legs
opportunities.transformation_hook: Bare corner becomes a styled reading nook for $189 — room feels twice as big
opportunities.before_state: Dead corner with nothing — random boxes stored there, wasted square footage, room feels incomplete
opportunities.after_state: Curated reading nook with accent chair, small side table, and throw — looks like a magazine shoot
opportunities.why_now: Spring room-refresh intent is at its annual high and corner transformation Reels punch above their weight on saves — higher ticket means fewer conversions but larger commission per sale.
